stationAlerts.name: Lancaster Toilet
stationAlerts.alertText: All toilets are currently out of order at Lancaster station. Please use the temporary toilets located on the right of the platform 3 exit.

locations.name: Unisex accessible toilet, platforms 4 & 5
locations.radarKeyAvailable: This toilet is accessed with a RADAR key
locations.accessibleHandles: The toilet entry handles may be operated by most people

locations.name: Unisex accessible toilet with baby change, platforms 1 & 2
locations.radarKeyAvailable: This toilet is accessed with a RADAR key
locations.accessibleHandles: The toilet entry handles may be operated by most people

toilets.location:
The accessible toilets are located on Platforms 3 and 4; these toilets are operated by a RADAR key.

Toilets are open while the station is open.

stepFreeCategory.category: A, Compliant step-free access to all platform(s)
stepFreeCategory.notes:
Category A - This station has step-free access to all platforms

Lifts to All Platforms, accessible via taking the right hand entrance to the over bridge from the ticket office.

trainRamp.storage: Ramps are kept at this station to provide assistance

stationAccessibility.tactilePaving: There are tactile warnings on all platforms

inductionLoop.provision: Induction loops are throughout this station

passengerAssistance.name: Lancaster Passenger Assistance Meeting Point 0
passengerAssistance.notes: Through the main entrance to the ticket office area and the passenger assistance meeting point is on the right.

staffHelp.notes: Passenger Assist meeting point is opposite the ticket office. Staff assistance is available at all times during the stations opening hours for boarding and alighting. Turn up and go is available although booking recommended.

helpline.notes: We want everyone to travel with confidence. That is why, if you are planning on travelling on national rail services, you can request an assistance booking in advance - now up to 2 hours before your journey is due to start, any time of the day. For more information about Passenger Assist and how to request an assistance booking via Passenger Assist, please click here.

helpPoints.location: Help Points are only available in limited locations
helpPoints.inductionLoop: Most Help Points do have induction loops

staffAssistance.announcements: Announcements are made both visually and audibly
staffAssistance.customerServiceNotes:
There is one Customer Information points, situated on platform booking hall, however customers are encouraged to approach any member of station staff for information.​​​​​​​

Audio announcements are broadcast throughout the station giving information about train running, platforms, security and safety announcements.

Customer information screens are provided on the station concourse, displaying train running information, and on each platform showing the next train and service information.

replacementBus.notes: Pick Up / Drop Off at the bus stop outside the station rear entrance adjacent to platform 3.

bus.notes: Information to plan your onward journey is available in a printable format here.

taxiRanks.taxiConfiguration: Taxis pick up and drop off at this taxi rank
taxiRanks.deployableRamp: Ramps cannot be deployed from the rear and side of a vehicle at this Taxi Rank
taxiRanks.helpPoint: There is no help point close to this taxi rank

ticketOffice.location: Ticket machines can be found in the ticket hall and on platform 3

cycling.cycleHireNotes: Leisure Lakes Bikes 103 Penny Street, Lancaster 01524 844389 lancaster@leisure-lakes.com www.leisurelakesbikes.com

spaces.notes: 120 stands by platform 1 (120 spaces) 8 hoops on platfrom 3 (2 x cycles per hoop = 16 spaces) 6 hoops on platform 4 (2 x cycles per hoop = 12 spaces) 20 hoops on platform 5 (2 x cycles per hoop = 40 spaces)

carParks.name: Lancaster Car Park

contactDetails.name: Lancaster Car Park Contact Details
contactDetails.note:
For information on how to get to the car park, plus work out the cost of your stay visit the Avanti West Coast website.

Different rates apply to non rail users, please speak to a member of staff.

carParks.notes:
For information on how to get to the car park, prebooking your space or working out the cost of your stay, please visit the Avanti West Coast website.

Different rates apply to non-rail users - please speak to a member of staff.
